name: MeshVertexList
summary: Provides access to the vertices and vertex-related functionality of a mesh.

methods.name: Add(Point3d)
methods.summary: Adds a new vertex to the end of the Vertex list.

returns.doc: The index of the newly added vertex.

methods.name: Add(Point3f)
methods.summary: Adds a new vertex to the end of the Vertex list.

returns.doc: The index of the newly added vertex.

methods.name: Add(Double, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public int Add(double x, double y, double z)
methods.summary: Adds a new vertex to the end of the Vertex list.

params.name: x
params.doc: X component of new vertex coordinate.

params.name: y
params.doc: Y component of new vertex coordinate.

params.name: z
params.doc: Z component of new vertex coordinate.

returns.doc: The index of the newly added vertex.

methods.name: Add(Single, Single, Single)
methods.signature: public int Add(float x, float y, float z)
methods.summary: Adds a new vertex to the end of the Vertex list.

params.name: x
params.doc: X component of new vertex coordinate.

params.name: y
params.doc: Y component of new vertex coordinate.

params.name: z
params.doc: Z component of new vertex coordinate.

returns.doc: The index of the newly added vertex.

methods.name: AddVertices(IEnumerable<Point3d>)
methods.summary: Adds a series of new vertices to the end of the vertex list. This overload accepts double-precision points.

params.name: vertices
params.doc: A list, an array or any enumerable set of Point3d.

methods.name: AddVertices(IEnumerable<Point3f>)
methods.summary: Adds a series of new vertices to the end of the vertex list. This overload accepts single-precision points.

params.name: vertices
params.doc: A list, an array or any enumerable set of Point3f.

methods.name: Align(Double, IEnumerable<Boolean>)
methods.signature: public int Align(double distance, IEnumerable<bool> whichVertices = null)
methods.summary: Moves mesh vertices that belong to naked edges to neighboring vertices, within the specified distance. This forces unaligned mesh vertices to the same location and is helpful to clean meshes for 3D printing.See the Copy_AlignMeshVertices Rhino command for more information.

params.name: distance
params.doc: Distance that should not be exceed when modifying the mesh.

params.name: whichVertices
params.doc: If not null, defines which vertices should be considered for adjustment.

returns.doc: If the operation succeeded, the number of moved vertices, or -1 on error.

methods.name: Align(IEnumerable<Mesh>, Double, IEnumerable<IEnumerable<Boolean>>)
methods.signature: public static int Align(IEnumerable<Mesh> meshes, double distance, IEnumerable<IEnumerable<bool>> whichVertices = null)
methods.summary: Moves mesh vertices that belong to naked edges to neighboring vertices, within the specified distance. This forces unaligned mesh vertices to the same location and is helpful to clean meshes for 3D printing.See the Copy_AlignMeshVertices Rhino command for more information.

params.name: meshes
params.doc: The enumerable of meshes that need to have vertices adjusted.

params.name: distance
params.doc: Distance that should not be exceed when modifying the mesh.

params.name: whichVertices
params.doc: If not null, defines which vertices should be considered for adjustment. If this parameter is non-null, then all items within it have to be non-null as well, defining for each mesh, which vertices to adjust.

returns.doc: If the operation succeeded, the number of moved vertices, or -1 on error.

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Clears the Vertex list on the mesh.

methods.name: CombineIdentical
methods.signature: public bool CombineIdentical(bool ignoreNormals, bool ignoreAdditional)
methods.summary: Merges identical vertices.

params.name: ignoreNormals
params.doc: If true, vertex normals will not be taken into consideration when comparing vertices.

params.name: ignoreAdditional
params.doc: If true, texture coordinates, colors, and principal curvatures will not be taken into consideration when comparing vertices.

returns.doc: true if the mesh is changed, in which case the mesh will have fewer vertices than before.

methods.name: CullUnused
methods.summary: Removes all vertices that are currently not used by the Face list.

returns.doc: The number of unused vertices that were removed.

methods.name: Destroy
methods.summary: Releases all memory allocated to store faces. The list capacity will be 0 after this call. Subsequent calls can add new items.

methods.name: GetConnectedVertices
methods.summary: Gets indices of all vertices that form "edges" with a given vertex index.

params.name: vertexIndex
params.doc: The index of a vertex to query.

returns.doc: An array of vertex indices that are connected with the specified vertex.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Gets an enumerator that yields all mesh vertices (points) in this collection.

returns.doc: The enumerator.

methods.name: GetTopologicalIndenticalVertices
methods.summary: Gets a list of other vertices which are "topologically" identical to this vertex.

params.name: vertexIndex
params.doc: A vertex index in the mesh.

returns.doc: Array of indices of vertices that are topologically the same as this vertex. The array includes vertexIndex. Returns null on failure.

methods.name: GetVertexFaces
methods.summary: Gets a list of all of the faces that share a given vertex.

params.name: vertexIndex
params.doc: The index of a vertex in the mesh.

returns.doc: An array of indices of faces on success, null on failure.

methods.name: Hide
methods.summary: Hides the vertex at the given index.

methods.name: HideAll
methods.summary: Hides all vertices in the mesh.

methods.name: IsHidden
methods.summary: Gets a value indicating whether or not a vertex is hidden.

returns.doc: true if the vertex is hidden, false if it is not.

methods.name: Point3dAt
methods.summary: Get double precision location at a given index

returns.doc: [Missing <returns> documentation for "M:Rhino.Geometry.Collections.MeshVertexList.Point3dAt(System.Int32)"]

methods.name: Remove(IEnumerable<Int32>, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool Remove(IEnumerable<int> indices, bool shrinkFaces)
methods.summary: Removes the vertices at the given indices and all faces that reference those vertices.

params.name: shrinkFaces
params.doc: If true, quads that reference the deleted vertex will be converted to triangles.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Remove(Int32, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool Remove(int index, bool shrinkFaces)
methods.summary: Removes the vertex at the given index and all faces that reference that index.

params.name: shrinkFaces
params.doc: If true, quads that reference the deleted vertex will be converted to triangles.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetVertex(Int32, Point3d)
methods.signature: public bool SetVertex(int index, Point3d vertex)
methods.summary: Sets or adds a vertex to the Vertex List. If [index] is less than [Count], the existing vertex at [index] will be modified.If [index] equals [Count], a new vertex is appended to the end of the vertex list.If [index] is larger than [Count], the function will return false.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetVertex(Int32, Point3f)
methods.signature: public bool SetVertex(int index, Point3f vertex)
methods.summary: Sets or adds a vertex to the Vertex List. If [index] is less than [Count], the existing vertex at [index] will be modified.If [index] equals [Count], a new vertex is appended to the end of the vertex list.If [index] is larger than [Count], the function will return false.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetVertex(Int32, Double, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public bool SetVertex(int index, double x, double y, double z)
methods.summary: Sets or adds a vertex to the Vertex List. If [index] is less than [Count], the existing vertex at [index] will be modified.If [index] equals [Count], a new vertex is appended to the end of the vertex list.If [index] is larger than [Count], the function will return false.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetVertex(Int32, Single, Single, Single)
methods.signature: public bool SetVertex(int index, float x, float y, float z)
methods.summary: Sets or adds a vertex to the Vertex List. If [index] is less than [Count], the existing vertex at [index] will be modified.If [index] equals [Count], a new vertex is appended to the end of the vertex list.If [index] is larger than [Count], the function will return false.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: SetVertex(Int32, Double, Double, Double, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool SetVertex(int index, double x, double y, double z, bool updateNormals)
methods.summary: Sets or adds a vertex to the Vertex List. If [index] is less than [Count], the existing vertex at [index] will be modified.If [index] equals [Count], a new vertex is appended to the end of the vertex list.If [index] is larger than [Count], the function will return false.

params.name: updateNormals
params.doc: Set to true if you'd like the vertex and face normals impacted by the change updated.

returns.doc: true on success, false on failure.

methods.name: Show
methods.summary: Shows the vertex at the given index.

methods.name: ShowAll
methods.summary: Shows all vertices in the mesh.

methods.name: ToFloatArray
methods.summary: Copies all vertices to a linear array of float in x,y,z order

returns.doc: The float array.

methods.name: ToPoint3dArray
methods.summary: Copies all vertices to a new array of Point3d.

returns.doc: A new array.

methods.name: ToPoint3fArray
methods.summary: Copies all vertices to a new array of Point3f.

returns.doc: A new array.

properties.name: Capacity
properties.summary: Gets or sets the total number of vertices the internal data structure can hold without resizing.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets or sets the number of mesh vertices.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Gets or sets the vertex at the given index. The index must be valid or an IndexOutOfRangeException will be thrown.

properties.name: UseDoublePrecisionVertices
properties.summary: Set to true if the vertices should be stored in double precision
